title: Art
content:
Art is a gipsy,
        Fickle as fair,
    Good to kiss and flirt with,
        But marry - if you dare!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Richard Le Gallienne, titled "Art", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
